title: CloverMTR
description: The official modpack for the CloverMTR Minecraft Server.
body:
## 🍀 Welcome to CloverMTR ﻿﻿ 
﻿
Are you just searching for an MTR server where you can express your creativity by making your own transit network/city freely?
*Then join CloverMTR.*
﻿
## **﻿﻿﻿🤗 Welcoming Community**
We have an welcoming community where people collaborate with each other to make an carefully crafted transport network.
﻿
## **﻿﻿﻿🏫 Learning, instead of not accepting**
Instead of simply not accepting people who are below the minimum quality expected of a builder, we help them learn, and grow, as a builder, to achieve their ambitions.
﻿
## **﻿﻿﻿🌈 Server Events**
We will have fun server events for members of the server, improving collaboration between server builders, and socialization.
﻿
## **﻿﻿✨ Make your builds how you want, when you want it**
You want to join but don't know if your style will go well with the server? 🤔
Don't worry, no style here is considered "wrong" or "weird".
Whether you're from Japan, Australia , Italy , or any other country, you are welcomed here﻿﻿🤗
